3277510.name: Hook The Boss
3277510.description:
The hero is not the one with the sword, but the one with the rope.

Against the monsters that threw the world into chaos, he made himself the balancer between heaven and earth.

Move quickly to dodge the boss's attacks, and wrap the rope around it to deliver a fatal blow.

To win in this world, you must be as fast as light and as sharp as an eagle.

[Boss Battle]

  • Fight against powerful bosses

  • They will try to kill you with indiscriminate attacks.

[Controls]

  • Use various platforming techniques

  • Move quickly using ropes

  • Avoid enemy patterns and counterattack
